title: Add .env and __pycache__ to .gitignore
description: Adds commonly missed entries to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits of environment files and Python bytecode caches.
diff:
diff --git a/.gitignore b/.gitignore
index 8c9d0e1..f2a3b4c 100644
--- a/.gitignore
+++ b/.gitignore
@@ -5,3 +5,7 @@ dist/
 *.egg-info/
 .pytest_cache/
 htmlcov/
+.env
+.env.local
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
comments: ci-bot: Gitignore updated. No sensitive files currently tracked.
author: greg
